description: WhiteHawk Minerals Corp. focuses on being the premier natural gas mineral and royalty business in the United States. It engages in disciplined acquisition, active management and ownership of high-quality mineral and royalty interests. The company was formerly known as WhiteHawk Income Corporation and changed its name to WhiteHawk Minerals Corp. in June 2026. The company was incorporated in 2022 and is based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
